CustomField.formula: Need_Postings_For_Others__c + Need_Postings_For_Self__c + Need_Responses_For_Others__c + Need_Responses_For_Self__c + Offer_Postings_For_Others__c + Offer_Postings_For_Self__c + Offer_Responses_For_Others__c + Offer_Responses_For_Self__c
CustomField.label: Give & Receive Absolute Value
